info.description:
Protocol definition

  1. HTTP/HTTPS transport protocol is used.
  2. JSON data transfer representation is used.
  3. POST methods are only supported.
  4. UTF-8 is used as request encoding.
  5. HTTP Header Content-Type – "application/json";
  6. Data compression:
    • The server supports only 'gzip' data compression algorithm.
    • The client sends to the server:
      • "Accept-Encoding: 'gzip'" header – in case when it accepts data compressed with the 'gzip' algorithm.
      • Content-Encoding: 'gzip'" header in case request data is compressed with the 'gzip' algorithm.
  7. Date format is "dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm". Please note, the server restores a date from the string using its own time zone.
info.title: Sherbook API Reference

post.summary: Load customer addresses, airports, train stations and ship terminals with availability info
post.description:
Returns list of account addresses along with usage information, airports, train stations and ship terminals
Every address contains restrictions information
Returns empty list if account has no address restrictions in booking settings
Only CORPORATE request type is allowed

post.summary: Check availability of job stops according to address restrictions settings
post.description:
Returns list of stops, which were used in job but currently unavailable for specified booking operation type
Only available for CORPORATE users. Otherwise returns INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST / INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST response status accordingly to passed customer type
Returns DATA_NOT_FOUND response status if there are no job for specified jobId or job has no stops
Returns empty array list if account has no address restrictions in booking configuration settings
Returns message field to display if job has unavailable address

Returns bonus program information
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_CORPORATE_REQUEST - corporate user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST - unavailable for anonymous user

Returns financial account logs of the authenticated user. Not available for anonymous users
Available filter parameters:
from, to - date intervals, inclusive
jobNumber - return logs, related to specified job number
Logs are sorted by creation date, descending. Last created logs goes first.
Returns null instead of a list if a financial account is not configured for the authenticated user
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_CORPORATE_REQUEST - corporate user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST - unavailable for anonymous user

Commits passenger position if driver is on way and passenger isn't on board. Saves client position for every active job in valid status or for particular job if jobId present in request
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing customer type or coordinates
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_CORPORATE_REQUEST - corporate user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST - unavailable for anonymous user
DATA_NOT_FOUND - booking has not been found
INVALID_ACCOUNT_INFO - current user cannot access booking

Batch method for loading booking details related to driver
loadPositionHistory could be used to load a driver's position history. Loading gap could be configured using historyIntervalInSeconds request body field. See:
/booking/load/stops/passed
/booking/load/driverPosition

post.summary: Find passed stop using booking id
post.description:
Returns id of passed stop
Passed stop id from response should be used in subsequent requests to optimise performance
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing customer type or booking id
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_CORPORATE_REQUEST - corporate user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST - unavailable for anonymous user
DATA_NOT_FOUND - booking has not been found or passenger is not on board
INVALID_ACCOUNT_INFO - current user cannot access this booking

In case of outdated application, the server sends application link
Possible error statuses:
SMARTPHONE_VALIDATION_FAILED - missing required smartphone details
APPLICATION_OUTDATED - smartphone version is outdated

Possible error statuses:
FILL_REQUIRED_DETAILS - invalid or incomplete login. Check loginFields for more information.
BOOKINGS_NOT_ALLOWED - account is not allowed for making bookings
ACCOUNT_ON_HOLD - account is on hold. Used by MOBILE_WS clients
PIN_ON_HOLD - pin is on hold. Used by MOBILE_WS clients
USER_ON_HOLD - user is on hold. Used by MOBILE_WS clients
APPLICATION_OUTDATED - smartphone version is outdated
SMARTPHONE_VALIDATION_FAILED - missing required details or smartphone is banned

Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - empty phone or password
FIELDS_VALIDATION_FAILED - invalid phone number format
USER_NOT_FOUND - registration info not found
USER_ON_HOLD - registration info is on hold
SMARTPHONE_VALIDATION_FAILED - missing required details or smartphone is banned
APPLICATION_OUTDATED - smartphone version is outdated

Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing device field
SMARTPHONE_VALIDATION_FAILED - missing required smartphone details
APPLICATION_OUTDATED - smartphone version is outdated
INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST - unavailable for anonymous user

Possible error statuses:
OPERATION_UNAVAILABLE - credit card provider mismatch. IPP provider required.

get.description:
releaseNumber - number of the relsease
releaseTimestamp - build time

Load retail kiosk settings if exists. Otherwise corporate settings
Possible error statuses:
DATA_NOT_FOUND - missing kiosk settings for authorized customer account

post.summary: Load languages available in the system

post.description:
Try to find passed locale. If not found, load default system or individual language
If user authorized and caller used, language will be used as individual's default language
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing locale
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - Retail user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_CORPORATE_REQUEST - Corporate user is not properly authenticated

post.summary: Log something or trigger an unexpected error

post.description:
Log in using only smartphone device information without registration
Unlike a registered user, an anonymous user is not allowed to load previously used addresses, credit cards, finished or cancelled bookings
Authenticates webportal anonymous user if smartphone device is null
In case of webportal authentication user must be unauthorized
Possible error statuses:
USER_ON_HOLD - smartphone owner is on hold
SMARTPHONE_VALIDATION_FAILED - missing required details or smartphone is banned
APPLICATION_OUTDATED - smartphone version is outdated
USER_NOT_FOUND - portal anonymous user not found (taxi.sherbookPortalConfig.anonymousCaller)

For corporate users login is represented as a multistage process. For different accounts various login schema could be used. The only difference between the used login schemas is a set of required fields, e.g. {account number, PIN, caller name} or {account number, account password} or {account number, PIN}
Possible error statuses:
FILL_REQUIRED_DETAILS - invalid or incomplete login. Check loginFields for more information.
BOOKINGS_NOT_ALLOWED - account is not allowed for making bookings
ACCOUNT_ON_HOLD - account is on hold. Used by MOBILE_WS clients
PIN_ON_HOLD - pin is on hold. Used by MOBILE_WS clients
USER_ON_HOLD - user is on hold. Used by MOBILE_WS clients
APPLICATION_OUTDATED - smartphone version is outdated
SMARTPHONE_VALIDATION_FAILED - missing required details or smartphone is banned

post.summary: Find authorization information using exposed token
post.description:
Possible error statuses:
TOKEN_NOT_VALID - invalid exposed token
TOKEN_NOT_FOUND - exposed or associated access/refresh token has not been found in token storage

Delete session information from the server
Revokes retail user token if token header specified
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - list of profile types is missing
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - could not properly logout retail user. Missing token header

Acquire a new pair of access/refresh token using refresh token
Previously granted token pair will be invalidated
Validates information encrypted in token against current account settings
Token considered not valid in the following cases:
- Account, pin or individual has been deleted
- Individual's pin has been changed
- callerUsed is true, but missing individual
- pinUsed is true, but missing pin
Possible error statuses:
TOKEN_NOT_VALID - invalid or expired refresh token
TOKEN_NOT_FOUND - refresh token has not been found in token storage

Log in to personal account using phone number and password
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - empty phone or password
FIELDS_VALIDATION_FAILED - invalid phone number format
USER_NOT_FOUND - registration info not found
USER_ON_HOLD - registration info is on hold
SMARTPHONE_VALIDATION_FAILED - missing required details or smartphone is banned
APPLICATION_OUTDATED - smartphone version is outdated

Invalidates previously granted access token
Refresh token will be removed as well
All exposed tokens will become invalid
Possible error statuses:
TOKEN_NOT_VALID - invalid access token
TOKEN_NOT_FOUND - access token has not been found in token storage

Login by token functionality used by Quickbooker and Web Kiosk booking clients to log in the system
To log in Quickbooker by retail individual token, retail individual has to be registered in the web portal or mobile application
Web Kiosk could be logged in by retail token without registered user
Possible error statuses:
OUTDATED_APPLICATION - Used by Kiosk. The code means that kiosk application needs to be updated
USER_NOT_FOUND - Profile associated with token is not found

Load active fleet information bounded by top left and right bottom coordinates
Information can be filtered using service id
Client can pass minimum track duration and used drivers to prioritise drivers that matches minimum duration and drivers that was previously used by the client. Priority is applied when response exceeds maximum allowed number of cars
Returns driver route history along with timestamps
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing coordinates

post.description:
Close current prepaid account
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_CORPORATE_REQUEST - corporate user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST - unavailable for anonymous user
OPERATION_UNAVAILABLE - could not close account due to several reasons: no active prepaid program, account is already closed, account is on hold, unexpected account status, unexpected financial system error

post.summary: Deposit funds using a credit card
post.description:
Deposit funds using a credit card
Returns a new balance if a credit card payment has been processed by the server.Otherwise returns a redirect information
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_CORPORATE_REQUEST - corporate user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST - unavailable for anonymous user
INVALID_REQUEST - amount must be greater than zero
OPERATION_UNAVAILABLE - could not find configured financial account, sms validation failed
CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_FAILED - either credit card is not valid or payment has been failed

post.summary: Find a prepaid account by a phone number
post.description:
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_CORPORATE_REQUEST - corporate user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST - unavailable for anonymous user

Available for retail and corporate user
RETAIL customer type is used by default if there are no customer type specified in request
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_CORPORATE_REQUEST - corporate user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST - anonymous user is not allowed to use this endpoint

Available only for retail users. Updates default email for individual and registration info
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing profile information
FIELDS_VALIDATION_FAILED - invalid email or name format
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated

Available only for retail users
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing password
FIELDS_VALIDATION_FAILED - too short password
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated

New registration code will be send to user.
Available only for retail users
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing phone
FIELDS_VALIDATION_FAILED - invalid phone number format
USER_ALREADY_EXISTS - registration info with the same number already exists
UNABLE_TO_SEND_PASSWORD - server is unable to send a password in an SMS message for some technical reasons
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated

Available for retail users. Closes current sherbook sessions and removes the user profile.
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - retail user is not properly authenticated
USER_ON_HOLD - retail user has been blocked by brute force protection mechanism
DATA_NOT_FOUND - retail user has already been removed

Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing phone number
FIELDS_VALIDATION_FAILED - invalid phone number
USER_NOT_FOUND - registration info not found
USER_ON_HOLD - registration info or individual is on hold
SMARTPHONE_VALIDATION_FAILED - missing required details or smartphone is banned
APPLICATION_OUTDATED - smartphone version is outdated
UNABLE_TO_SEND_PASSWORD - internal error during sms sending

Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing phone number
FIELDS_VALIDATION_FAILED - invalid phone number or name or email
USER_ON_HOLD - individual for this phone number is on hold
SMARTPHONE_VALIDATION_FAILED - missing required details or smartphone is banned
APPLICATION_OUTDATED - smartphone version is outdated
OPERATION_UNAVAILABLE - operation is currently unavailable
UNABLE_TO_SEND_PASSWORD - server is unable to send a password due to technical reasons
USER_ALREADY_EXISTS - User with the specified phone number is already registered
REGISTRATION_FAILED - Registration has not been completed due to the internal server error

Request a new password (recovery). The server will send the same password each time. Once a user has successfully logged in with the new password, the old password will expire and the new password will be used for the next recovery.
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing phone number
FIELDS_VALIDATION_FAILED - invalid phone number
USER_NOT_FOUND - registration info not found
USER_ON_HOLD - registration info or individual is on hold
SMARTPHONE_VALIDATION_FAILED - missing required smartphone details
APPLICATION_OUTDATED - smartphone version is outdated
UNABLE_TO_SEND_PASSWORD - internal error during sms sending
OPERATION_UNAVAILABLE - unexpected exception or restricted operation

FIELDS_VALIDATION_FAILED - invalid phone number

get.summary: Generates HTML page using email template. Uses token request parameter to encrypt sensitive information such as jobId
Generates PDF from HTML page created using email template. Uses token request parameter to encrypt sensitive information such as jobId

post.summary: Load settings relating to a customer type. For each customer type sent in a request the server returns corresponding booking settings
post.description:
Possible error statuses:
INVALID_REQUEST - missing customer types
INVALID_RETAIL_REQUEST - Retail user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_CORPORATE_REQUEST - Corporate user is not properly authenticated
INVALID_ANONYMOUS_REQUEST - Anonymous user couldn't share requests with another types

post.summary: Load settings actual for all customer types

get.description:
Checks that server instance is running and application context has started successfully
Returns simple "OK" answer. Can be used by automatic monitoring tools

eventName.description: The name of the event that triggered the operation

operationAmount.description: Operation amount. Greater or less than zero

reserved.description: Available balance change due to reservation for a job. Greater or less than zero

transactionName.description: The name of the performed transaction

mandatoryValidFlightNumber.description: When enabled, a valid flight number is mandatory to confirm an arrival airport booking (taxi.sherbookConfig.mandatoryValidFlightNumber)

canEnterReferralCode.description: Indicates whether 'Referral Code' input field can be shown to client

etaDurationMinutes.description: Maximum allowed duration between eta and job date (taxi.booking.etaDurationMinutes)

paymentTypeRestrictions.description: Key - payment type; Value - set of incompatible payment types. More convenient form of ss taxi.PaymentTypeConfig.paymentRestrictions (default PAY_PAL/CREDIT_CARD)

requestConsentToNotifications.description: taxi.MarketingCampaignConfig.consentRequestedOnAuth && consent has not been requested before

applePayProvider.description: Used to select an appropriate integration method

googlePayProvider.description: Used to select an appropriate integration method

merchantCountry.description: Used in client-side sdk to initialize payments

postponeCCDetails.description: Mobile user will be able to postpone credit card details input even if only one payment type is available

customerServicePhone.description: Customer service phone from DEFAULT company information

initialCreditCardScreenMode.description:
Show credit card form after registration.
-1 - disabled; 0 - screen is shown, customer can skip; >0 - screen is show, customer can skip after specified number of seconds

jobOfferDecisionTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for client to make decision about offered driver (taxi.mobileWsAppConfiguration.jobOfferDecisionTimeout)

jobOfferRefreshPeriod.description: Delay in seconds between requests to the offer end-point to get current state of an offer (taxi.mobileWsAppConfiguration.jobOfferServiceDelay)

jobOfferTimeout.description: Period of time between the first notification and the moment when offer is closed. (taxi.JobOfferConfiguration.overallOfferTimeoutSeconds) + additional timeout in seconds for drivers to make decision about offered booking (taxi.mobileWsAppConfiguration.jobOfferTimeoutDelta)

JobStopsAvailabilityResponse.title: JobStopsAvailabilityResponse
JobStopsAvailabilityResponse.description: List of currently unavailable job stops

contacts.description: Available caller options with emails and phones

valid.description: Is field passed validation or not

passedStop.description: ID of the last passed stop

shipTerminalsUsed.description: At least one ship terminal exists

addressLoadingLimit.description: max quantity of items in a search addresses response (taxi.sherbookConfig.addressLoadingLimit)

addressPositionSearchDistance.description: max distance for searching addresses by position, in meters (taxi.sherbookConfig.addressPositionSearchDistance)

customerServicePhone.description: Customer service phone from DEFAULT company information

driverPositionRefreshPeriod.description: Delay in seconds between requests to the job end-point to get current position of a driver allocated to the job (taxi.sherbookConfig.driverPositionServiceDelay)

enableWhatsapp.description: Indicates whether 'WhatsApp Notifications' block is enabled in Profile

jobDetailsRefreshPeriod.description: Delay in seconds between requests to the job end-point to get current job version (taxi.sherbookConfig.jobVersionServiceDelay)

maxAsDirectedMinutes.description: Maximum allowed time for 'as directed' journeys (taxi.booking.maxAsDirectedMinutes)

maxPrebookingDays.description: Maximum number of days between day of booking and prebooking job date (taxi.booking.maxPrebookingDays)

referralProgramEnabled.description: Indicates whether referral program is enabled in system

referralProgramLink.description: Additional link for showing 'Share referral code' web page

requirePolicyAgreement.description: if users must accept Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy to use portal/mobile app (taxi.sherbookConfig.requireTermsConditionsAndPrivacyPolicyAgreement)

showDriverDetails.description: Is driver name returned by Sherbook (taxi.sherbookConfig.showDriverName)

showReferralCodeExpirationDate.description: Indicates whether referral code expiration date must be shown to client

showReferralCodeUsageCount.description: Indicates whether referral code usage count must be shown to client

trainStationsUsed.description: At least on train station used
